prompt: A cinematic cyberpunk portrait of Izanagi reimagined as a divine futuristic warrior, shown from the back and slightly in profile in a rain-slick neon metropolis at night. The figure stands centered in the foreground with a calm, commanding presence, looking left over one shoulder, with messy black layered hair with a braided strand and a youthful masculine silhouette. His body is an intricate fusion of human and machine: glossy black biomechanical arms, shoulders, and torso with exposed cables, metallic joints, and elegant gold-lit circuitry. He wears flowing white ceremonial robes inspired by Shinto and imperial Japanese garments, layered in torn, wind-swept translucent fabric with subtle gold embroidery, tassels, cords, and ornamental clasps, draped over the cybernetic body like sacred vestments. In his right hand he holds a luminous katana angled downward, the blade blazing with white-gold energy, with an ornate guard and glowing reflections across the wet ground. Behind his head is a huge radiant circular halo made of holographic golden concentric rings, arcane circuitry, and celestial interface lines, creating the effect of a divine techno-mandala. In the mid-background stands a large red torii gate, framed by towering futuristic skyscrapers covered in dense windows and vertical city lights. The street surface is glossy with rain and mirrors the sword glow and city illumination. Fill the scene with drifting sparks, floating embers, fine mist, cinematic backlighting, and dramatic contrast between dark steel tones and white and gold. Ultra-detailed, epic, mythic, photorealistic concept art, high contrast, sharp focus, volumetric lighting, reflective surfaces, intricate costume design, Japanese myth fused with sci-fi futurism, vertical composition.
